items.name: ❄️「Frostveil Coat [PBR]」❄️
items.description:
A luxurious long coat wrapped in soft fur trim, designed to keep you warm in the harshest of winters.
The flowing silhouette and plush textures create a balance of elegance and coziness — perfect for icy kingdoms, magical adventures, or winter fashion statements.
✨ Features
Long robe-style coat with fur-lined cuffs and collar
Elegant and cozy PBR texture work
Perfect for fantasy, RPG, or seasonal outfits
Adds a regal, wintery flair to your avatar

items.name: Moon Light Great Sword
items.description: A mythical blade said to fall from the heavens like a shard of moonlight. Legends speak of a wandering knight who forged the sword from crystallized stardust, giving it a core of pure, living energy. When drawn, the blade glows with a cold blue radiance, humming with power as if it longs to strike down darkness itself. Some say the sword chooses its wielder, responding only to those with unwavering resolve. In the hands of a true warrior, each swing releases a wave of lunar brilliance capable of cutting through fear, fate, and even destiny. This is not just a weapon — it is a symbol of clarity, courage, and the calm strength of the silent night. Wield it with honor. Shine with purpose. Become the one who carries the light.

items.name: Bewitching Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer
items.description:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Knits&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Prepare to be entranced by our Bewitching Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer, a spellbinding addition to your Roblox avatar's wardrobe. This longline blazer seamlessly blends style and charm, featuring an intricate knitted design adorned with bewitching and alluring details. Whether you're wandering through enchanted forests or captivating virtual revelers at costume balls, this blazer ensures that all eyes are on you. The Bewitching Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer exudes an aura of magical elegance and allure, making it the ultimate choice for those who wish to embrace the spirit of Halloween in style. Elevate your avatar's allure and sophistication - seize your Bewitching Blazer now and create a Halloween experience like no other!
